title: PMO Manager, Frankfurt
bonus_skills: Chinese language (strong advantage — SHEIN is a Chinese company)
matched_skills: PMO operations & project planning (HSBC 6-workstream PMO, milestone tracking)
Cross-functional coordination — 'facilitate horizontal communication' maps directly to HSBC cross-team interface
Project update reporting & dashboards (HSBC budget variance dashboards, C-suite reporting)
Risk escalation & prioritisation management (HSBC risk escalation track)
Chinese C2 / Native — major advantage at Chinese-owned SHEIN
missing_skills: Logistics / supply chain domain knowledge — SHEIN focus is logistics project management (soft gap — skills transferable)
E-commerce industry context (no prior SHEIN/e-commerce background)
core_responsibilities: Evaluate and plan logistics-related internal and external projects (time efficiency, cost reduction, system construction)
Develop project plans with clear timelines and milestones, track progress, ensure on-time delivery
Resolve bottlenecks, facilitate horizontal communication, provide project updates
Routine decision-making during projects to ensure smooth progress
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: 6-workstream PMO — project planning, milestone tracking, escalation — directly maps to all core responsibilities
HSBC: C-suite reporting + budget variance dashboards — maps to project updates and tracking
Chinese C2 native — explicitly valuable at SHEIN; flag in cover letter as cultural/language asset
HSBC: cross-functional interface (Product/Engineering/Marketing) — mirrors 'facilitate horizontal communication'
Frame logistics gap: Hapag-Lloyd working student (shipping logistics adjacent) provides industry exposure

company_info.size_raw: SHEIN — global fast fashion e-commerce, Chinese-owned
